metadata.title: CyberArmor | Hardware-Enforced Digital Sovereignty
metadata.description: Premium USB security token for absolute physical control over your PC, data, and digital identity.

A.headline: Absolute Physical Control Over Your Digital Sovereignty
A.subheadline: A defense-grade USB security token that locks your PC, encrypts your data, and wipes keys on tamper. No cloud. No backdoors. Only you hold the key.

B.headline: The Last Key You Will Ever Need to Trust
B.subheadline: Hardware-enforced zero trust for your devices. One physical token replaces passwords, cloud vaults, and second-factor apps.

earlyAccess.label: Join the priority access list
earlyAccess.successMessage: You are on the priority access list.
earlyAccess.errorInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.
earlyAccess.privacyNote: No spam. No third-party tracking. Your email stays encrypted at rest.

trust.title: Trusted by security-first organizations
trust.certifications: FIPS 140-3 Level 4 · Common Criteria EAL6+ · NATO Restricted

explodedView.title: Four Layers of Physical Defense
explodedView.subtitle: Scroll to disassemble the token and inspect each hardened layer.

shell.title: Titanium Alloy Shell
shell.description: Aerospace-grade titanium casing with tamper-evident seals and EMI shielding.

resin.title: Shockproof Resin Layer
resin.description: Impact-absorbing resin matrix isolates components from shock, vibration, and side-channel probing.

chip.title: EAL6+ Secure Element
chip.description: Common Criteria EAL6+ certified chip stores keys in an isolated secure enclave with active shielding.

biometric.title: Biometric Scanner Array
biometric.description: Capacitive fingerprint matcher performs on-device template comparison. Biometric data never leaves the token.

items.quote: The only hardware token we have evaluated where the keys genuinely never enter the host operating system.
Remote provisioning and cryptographic erasure on tamper give us a clean incident-response story.
Finally a consumer-grade form factor with HSM-like separation between the key material and the user interface.

cookieBanner.title: Your data. Your consent.
cookieBanner.description: CyberArmor does not use third-party trackers. We only load analytics or marketing scripts after explicit opt-in. Essential cookies for security and language remain active.
